creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from "Zane C.B." <vvelox@vvelox.net> -----

From: "Zane C.B." <vvelox@vvelox.net>
To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, freebsd-ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org
Cc: 
Subject: Re: ports/128382: net port: misc/zconf-utils Various utilities for manipulating ZConf

Misc clean ups of the Makefile. I've also added 'zcls', which I
forgot. Pkg_desc now contains a description of each installed binary.

----- End forwarded message -----
